_publications._publicationTitle: Unmasking Intra-tumoral Heterogeneity and Clonal Evolution in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: We first reviewed the H&E images of the tumor to correlate histology to the gross images of the tumor. H&E stained sections in Figure 2 show representative images of the three sampled areas.
details: Successfully used to review H&E images of tumor samples to correlate histology to gross images
